name: Initialize empty C^d Hilbert space before basis selection

phase_0.domain_name: Initialize empty C^d Hilbert space before basis selection
phase_0.boundary_condition: Crystal of Types lattice (17,280,000 elements) provides terminal constraint manifold

VINIT.justification: Empty quantum state space before any SIC-POVM structure imposed

TANCH.justification: Terminates the measurement space by selecting admissible joint primitive assignments

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism generating 144 SIC elements from fiducial via displacement operators

AREV.justification: Reverse process from measurement statistics back to density matrix via frame inversion

CLINK.justification: Sequential chaining of 12 primitives (3+4+5 family structure) defining classification

IMSCRIB.justification: Identity morphism where measurement space reconstructs its own generating vector

FSPLIT.justification: Branches single primitive assignment into D-family vs (T,P)-family measurement contexts

FFUSE.justification: Reconstitutes 12-dimensional space from family-partitioned branches, maintaining μ∘δ=id

EVALT.justification: True branch when |⟨ψᵢ|ψⱼ⟩|² = 1/13 condition holds for all i≠j

EVALF.justification: False branch when ig-pulse POVM fails exact SIC symmetry (24/144 coverage)

ENGAGR.justification: Both true/false simultaneously - dialetheia gate absorbing contradictions in self-modeling fixed-point

IFIX.justification: Irreversible fixation of the Zauner fiducial as variational solution

phase_3.void_description: C^12 Hilbert space with no measurement structure - pure dimensional void before basis selection
phase_3.true_description: Valid SIC-POVM state with 144 equiangular projectors satisfying |⟨ψᵢ|ψⱼ⟩|² = 1/13
phase_3.false_description: Invalid measurement configuration - heteroskedastic POVM failing SIC geometric constraints
phase_3.both_description: Criticality fixed-point where ⊙ absorbs contradictory self-references in measurement boundary

steps.domain_action: Initialize empty C^12 Hilbert space before any basis or measurement structure exists
Chain 12 primitive axes together - (Ð,Þ,Φ) + (Ħ,Σ,ɢ,ƒ,Ç) + (Ř,Γ,⊙,Ω) forming classification backbone
Branch 12-primitive assignment into D-family (3 values each) vs combined (T,P)-family (4,5 values)
Apply Weyl-Heisenberg displacement operators to generate 144 SIC elements from fiducial
Verify |⟨ψᵢ|ψⱼ⟩|² = 1/13 condition holds - enter true branch for valid SIC geometry
Fiducial |ψ₀⟩ recognizes itself as the measurement space's identity morphism
Permanently record frame potential minimum F* = 143/169 as solved variational target
Reconstitute full 12-dimensional space from family-partitioned branches maintaining Frobenius condition
Map measurement outcomes to Crystal of Types outcome space (3³×4⁵×5⁴=17,280,000)
Criticality primitive ⊙ absorbs contradictions when system self-measures at fixed-point
Execute inverse tomography - reconstruct density matrix ρ from 144 SIC probabilities
Compose primitive measurement results into joint classification type
Second branch - Zauner symmetry vs Stark unit arithmetic realization
Confirm arithmetic proof via Stark units in ray class fields supports SIC existence
Alternative heteroskedastic POVM (ig-pulse) fails exact SIC conditions but approximates
Self-reference loop where measurement apparatus imscribes its own structure through classification
Project onto Shavian alphabet (49=7² symbols) as d=7 SIC outcome space
Combine d=7 type alphabet with d=12 primitive space to form d=84 composite SIC H₇⊗H₁₂
Execute 84²=7056 joint measurement space as full classification outcome set
Terminate system within Crystal constraint manifold selecting admissible trajectories
Append-only record of machine learning confirmation with hyperspherical prior 17,280,000 training steps
Compose all three Frobenius closures - primitive partition, measurement/analysis, composite structure
Hold both analytical (Zauner) and numerical (ML) confirmations simultaneously without resolution
Final reconstruction - verify ΔS=0 informational completeness through zero reconstruction entropy

phase_5.compiler_frontend: Weyl-Heisenberg group generators Z,X provide unitary compilation of displacement operations
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Quantum channel capacity constraints govern communication between SIC elements in POVM
phase_5.memory_mechanism: Density matrix ρ stores mixed quantum state information in 12×12 Hermitian operator format
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Variational autoencoder training epochs determine timing of fiducial convergence in L-BFGS-B
phase_5.alfs_store: Crystal of Types catalog provides canonical reference for 17,280,000 admissible joint primitive assignments

phase_6.cycle_cost: One frame potential evaluation per L-BFGS-B iteration
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: Unconstrained C^12 state vector with random amplitudes
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — SIC measurement is informationally complete with zero reconstruction entropy
